name: TabLab
description: TabLab is a tablet-based interactive learning lab with content for all subjects and all classes from 1st to 12th grade in India.

taxonomy.sub_category: TabLab Updated on June 9, 2024 · Created on October 5, 2020 TabLab TabLab is a tablet-based interactive learning lab with content for all subjects and all classes from 1st to 12th grade in India. Developed By iDream Education Tested By TabLab Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description TabLab is a tablet-based interactive learning lab with content for all subjects and all classes from 1 st to 12 th in India. It provides content in several languages and is designed to increase student engagement and empower teachers to give personalized attention to each student. TabLab consists of individual tablets, and auto charging storage trolley, and an android based offline learning platform which allows multi-student login. The tablets are preloaded with interactive learning content and the trolley allows for easy charging and safe storage of the devices in a class set up. The Analytics part provides useful information to teachers where usage reports and live monitoring of students can be done. Target SDGs SDG 4: Quality Education SDG 10: Reduced Inequalities Target Users (Target Impact Group) Community, Public Sector Agencies Distributors / Implementing Organizations iDream Education Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Kio Kit . Countries India Manufacturing/Building Method Unknown Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model Users can obtain the product directly from the manufacturer. Distributions to Date Status Unknown Telecommunication service required Mobile internet, Fixed internet, WiFi Level of connection service needed 3G, 4G Device(s) required Tablet Additional features required microSD Permanent network connectivity required (Y/N[specify],Other [specify]) No Two way communication (Y/N) Yes Usage rate (%) Unknown Literacy support (Y (specify) /N) Yes Languages available (list) English, Hindi and local languages. Operating system and version Android Power requirements Occasional power supply eEducation application Education equipment, Education provider Design Specifications TabLab is a Plug & Play Mobile Digital Lab for Schools in India that incorporates android tablets, an auto charging storage trolley, and an android based offline learning platform which allows multi-student login. The Digital Lab is designed to offer a student-centric learning environment and increase student engagement, empower teachers, and allow easy setup and use. It is designed to work in areas with limited connectivity and power supply. The learning content is designed to meet the standards of the National Council of Educational Research and Training education curriculum and various state boards in India and the Learning Management System allows multiple students to log in to the same device. Teachers can access the analytics information of the students allowing them to better assess the students and provide personalized feedback. The storage trolley acts as a charging station and keeps the devices safe when not in use. Product Schematics Technical Support Provided by the manufacturer. Replacement Components Unknown Lifecycle Unknown Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters Designer specified performance targets include: easy to set up, student-centric, low power, and connectivity requirement. Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety No known safety hazards are related to this product. Complementary Technical Systems TabLab also allows for one to add their own content into the tablet. Academic Research and References “Goal 4.” n.d. Sdgs.Un.Org. Accessed June 9, 2024. https://sdgs.un.org/goals/goal4 Tablet Based Smart ICT Lab. 2018. https://www.idreameducation.org/iPrep_Digital_Library Compliance with regulations The leaning content complies with The National Council of Educational Research and Training education curriculum. Evaluation methods TabLab is evaluated for increasing student engagement, empowering teachers and ease of set up and use. Other Information Videos of TabLab can be found here .
